planner.goal: Verify user identity and retrieve account status to ensure authorization for technical support.
User reported a persistent Wi-Fi connectivity issue. Route to DiagnosticSubAgent for troubleshooting steps.
Troubleshooting failed to resolve the issue. Determine priority level and prepare to create a field technician ticket.
Finalize formal ticket creation and provide the user with a tracking ID and SLA expectations.

router.log: Handing off to DiagnosticSubAgent for specialized hardware analysis.
Diagnostic results indicate hardware failure. Invoking ticket creation tool.

tool_input.description: Router 'R-404' power-cycle and firmware reset failed to restore signal.

router.log: Confirming ticket status and sending notification.

tool_input.message: Your technical support ticket TIX-5521 has been created. A technician will visit within 24 hours.

tools.output: Account Verified: Priya Sharma. Status: Active. Plan: Ultra-Fiber 500Mbps.
Diagnostic Complete: Remote reset unsuccessful. Optical signal strength below threshold (-32dBm). Physical inspection required.
SMS notification successfully delivered to recipient.
